narrative_log: The sunlight filters through the heavy curtains of your bedroom, a relentless intrusion that feels like a physical assault against your eyelids. Your head throbs with the dull, rhythmic ache of a hangover—the price paid for a particularly lucrative Tuesday night at the club. You lie motionless for a moment, listening to the distant sounds of the suburban morning: a neighbor's lawnmower, the faint chirp of birds, and the muffled thump of bass from the basement where Chai is undoubtedly still asleep. The air in the room is stale, smelling of last night's perfume and the lingering scent of expensive gin. It was a good night, but God, you feel every single year of your mid-twenties right now. You wake up in your bedroom with a hangover, needing to recover and prepare for another shift at the club tonight.
Jade works as a stripper in the city and is currently recovering from a long, profitable shift.
Jade's sister, Chai, lives in the basement of the house.
blueprint: The house consists of the main floor (kitchen, living room, Jade's bedroom, bathroom) and a finished basement where Chai resides.

player.description: You are Jade, a young woman in her mid-twenties with skin the color of milk chocolate and kinky black hair. You are currently wearing only black lace panties.

npc_chai.name: Chai
npc_chai.description: Jade's 22-year-old sister. She is currently living in the finished basement of the house while she finishes college. She is spirited, a bit disorganized, and deeply reliant on her sister's stability.

room_start.name: Jade's Bedroom
room_start.description:
Your bedroom is a sanctuary of organized chaos. The walls are painted a calming sage green, adorned with a few eclectic art prints and a large, ornate mirror that reflects the disarray of your life. A massive, plush king-sized bed dominates the center of the room, its high-thread-count sheets tangled around you in a cocoon of cotton and silk. A mahogany dresser stands against the far wall, topped with an overflowing tray of jewelry and a half-empty bottle of expensive moisturizer. To the left, a walk-in closet is slightly ajar, revealing a glimpse of high heels and a shimmering collection of stage wear. The carpet is a deep, plush cream, currently littered with a discarded robe and a single black pump. A large window allows a sliver of blinding morning light to slice across the floor, illuminating dust motes dancing in the air.

You can see here: Smartphone, Glass of Water, Nightstand.

i_1757bd.name: Smartphone
i_1757bd.description: A modern smartphone with a cracked screen, lying face-down on the nightstand.

i_28c21d.name: Glass of Water
i_28c21d.description: A half-empty glass of lukewarm water resting on the nightstand.

i_25bed9.name: Nightstand
i_25bed9.description: A small wooden table beside the bed, cluttered with personal items.
